package rulefixtures

// scenario for likely_unindexed_query: Query shapes like leading-wildcard LIKE or ORDER BY without LIMIT that often scale poorly.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: performance; severity: contextual.
type Rule614NegativeRecord struct {
	ID int
	Name string
	Values []string
}

func scenario614Negative(records []Rule614NegativeRecord) int {
	total := 0
	for _, record := range records {
		total += record.ID + len(record.Values)
	}
	return total
}
